decoded-value.description: Decoded content extracted from the QR code.

description.description: Human-readable description or context about the decoded QR code.

qr-image.description: Original image containing the QR code.

reference.description: Reference or link related to the decoded QR code artifact.

source.description: Source system or project that produced the decoded QR code.

description: Object describing a decoded QR code, including its decoded value, original image, and contextual description.
name: decoded-qrcode
